prompt: Create a high-detail anime cyberpunk key visual of Tomoshibi Kii, short-haired version: a fierce young woman crouching on the narrow edge of a skyscraper rooftop high above a dense futuristic city at night. Use a dramatic vertical 2:3 composition, extreme high-angle perspective looking down into glowing canyons of buildings, with the character dominating the foreground and centered slightly right. She has short tousled deep violet hair with yellow-gold underlayers and streaks, sharp golden eyes, pale skin, a serious defiant expression, and a small black headset microphone at her cheek. Outfit: black tactical streetwear with gold accents, including a high-collar oversized hooded jacket, cropped black top with strap details, choker, fingerless gloves, loose cargo pants, knee padding, heavy boots, belts, zippers, brass snaps, and a shield-like geometric insignia patch on the sleeve. Lighting is moody neon purple and amber, with strong rim light on hair and jacket edges, glossy fabric highlights, rain-damp rooftop reflections, and dense detail in the city windows. Background: towering skyscrapers packed with tiny lit windows, glowing purple holographic billboards, orange warning UI graphics, and a vast night skyline fading into darkness. Include exactly 4 prominent holographic screens: 1 large purple portrait screen of the same girl on the upper left, 1 smaller purple emblem/abstract symbol screen on the lower left, 1 orange warning triangle screen on the upper right, and 1 purple waveform/data screen on the mid-right. Style should be polished Japanese anime key art, intricate linework, cinematic depth, luminous cyberpunk atmosphere, ultra-detailed background, sharp focus on the character, no visible watermark, no extra readable text beyond abstract UI marks.
